portal.label: Portal
portal.description: GlobalProtect portal hostname (e.g. vpn.example.com). Empty falls back to $NOCTALIA_GPCLIENT_PORTAL.

gateway.label: Gateway
gateway.description: Optional gateway override (-g flag). Empty for auto / $NOCTALIA_GPCLIENT_GATEWAY.

iface.label: Interface
iface.description: Tunnel interface name. Empty falls back to $NOCTALIA_GPCLIENT_INTERFACE or gpd0.

default_route.label: Default route via VPN
default_route.description: Run `sudo ip route replace default dev <iface>` while connected; removed on disconnect.
